Dungeon_Classes.Tile

Description
Character_Classes
 
Dungeon_Classes
 

  • Uses of Tile in Character_Classes

    Methods in Character_Classes that return Tile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Tile
    GameCharacter.nextTile(int direction, Floor floor)
    Calculates the adjacent tile coordinate based on an input direction.
    Methods in Character_Classes with parameters of type Tile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    EnemyChar.detectPlayer(Tile[][] map, PlayableChar Yohane)
    Calculates whether the player character is within the enemy's detection range using Manhattan distance calculation.
    void
    PlayableChar.dig(Tile tile, Floor floor)
    Executes wall destruction processing against blocked target map coordinates.
    void
    PlayableChar.findCharTile(Tile[][] map)
    Scans the 2D layout grid structure looking for explicitly matching unique character keys to accurately synchronize tracking coordinates during initialization steps.

  • Uses of Tile in Dungeon_Classes

    Subclasses of Tile in Dungeon_Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DestructibleTile
    Represents a tile within the dungeon layout that can be broken or collected.
    Methods in Dungeon_Classes that return Tile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Tile[][]
    Floor.getMap()
     
    Methods in Dungeon_Classes with parameters of type Tile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Floor.destroyTile(Tile tile)
    Replaces a specific block node with a regular, passable floor layout tile upon breakdown.
    void
    Floor.setMap(Tile[][] map)
     
    boolean
    Floor.validateMove(Tile dest)
    Validates if a chosen step destination falls safely inside the boundaries of the map grid and checks whether the physical layout features allow structural passability.
    Constructors in Dungeon_Classes with parameters of type Tile
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DestructibleTile(Tile parentTile)
    Constructs a destructible tile copy using attributes from an existing parent Tile instance.
     
    Tile(Tile refTile)
    Constructs a new tile by copying attributes and values out of an existing reference node.
